ogTitle: Murrawombie vs Murray Gorge: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Murrawombie and Murray Gorge.
heading: Murrawombie vs Murray Gorge — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Murrawombie, New South Wales and Murray Gorge, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Murray Gorge has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Murrawombie (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Murrawombie or Murray Gorge safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Murrawombie has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Murray Gorge scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Murrawombie scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Murray Gorge scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Murrawombie or Murray Gorge?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Murray Gorge has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
